race.comment: PANTOJA (4) switches to synthetic for the first time after a fair run over 1000m at Caulfield Heath most recently. This much easier and expected to go well. MR MARKLE (3) settled well back then came home powerfully to score by half a length over 1000m at Casterton last time out. Should be tough to stop again. PARIS COLLECTION (6) turned in a modest performance when ninth last time out over 1100m at Geelong, beaten 6 lengths, after a win at Kilmore at the previous outing. Has ability and is worth another chance. PRINCE MARIONETTE (7) led and faded here last time but fitter and is a third-up winner.
